title: Senior Doctor - CMC Vellore - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - CMC Vellore - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
